question_text: Each of a set of n processes executes the following code using two semaphores a and b initialized to 1 and 0, respectively. Assume that count is a shared variable initialized to 0 and not used in CODE SECTION P.

options.C: ODE SECTION P wait(a); count=count+1; if (count==n) signal(b); signal(a); wait(b); signal(b);
options.A: It ensures that at most two processes are in CODE SECTION Q at any time.
options.B: It ensures that all processes execute CODE SECTION P mutually exclusively.
options.D: It ensures that at most n – 1 processes are in CODE SECTION P at any time.
